notes: ADAptify — a site-wide accessibility widget (contrast, text size, grayscale, invert, readable font, highlight links, big cursor, pause motion) with its own CMS tab. Enable/disable, placement, and brand colors are stored server-side in data/adaptify.json and apply to every page instantly. One-click install drops the widget script across all pages. Plus the 1.3.0 work: server-level page list, automatic server connection, server-side settings, Revisions ledger, faithful HTML import, WAF-proof multipart save, square media picker + 16:9 desktop editor, FAQ/accordion editing, and Privacy Policy generator.
apiNote: admin/api.php holds this site's secrets (API token) and is never auto-updated. If a release changes api.php, update it by hand. 1.4.0 adds 'adaptify.js' to api.php's repo-fetch allow-list — only needed for installing the widget from a PRIVATE repo; public-repo installs work without updating api.php.
